articles.title: Sinner Ties Djokovic's Record with 20th Straight Masters Win—and He's Not Done Yet
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner cruised past Cameron Norrie at the Madrid Open, notching his 20th consecutive Masters 1000 victory. He equals Novak Djokovic's record for the best season start at this level. Next up: a quarter-final clash with either Kopriva or teenage wildcard Jodar.

articles.title: From Cal to UVA: Teagan O'Dell's Transfer Shakes Up NCAA Swimming
articles.summary: Freshman phenom Teagan O'Dell is transferring from Cal to Virginia, bringing her 46 NCAA points and three 'A' final appearances to the six-time defending champions. Her move could tip the scales in the Cavaliers' quest for a seventh straight title.

articles.title: Adidas's $500 Super Shoe: Featherlight Tech That Crushed a Marathon Record
articles.summary: The Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3, weighing under 100 grams, helped Sabastian Sawe break the two-hour marathon barrier. With a new foam and carbon-fiber rim, it's built for elite speed—but its $500 price tag and limited availability raise the question: is it worth it for the rest of us?
